enclave_type.description: Specifies the type of enclave used for confidential computing, such as Virtualization-Based Security (VBS) or Intel SGX.

license_type.description: Specifies the licensing model for the SQL elastic pool, either 'LicenseIncluded' or 'BasePrice'.

maintenance_configuration_name.description: Specifies the name of the maintenance configuration to apply to the elastic pool. Must be a valid maintenance configuration name in the region.

max_size_bytes.description: Specifies the maximum storage size for the elastic pool in bytes. Must be within the supported range for the selected service tier.

max_size_gb.description: Specifies the maximum storage size in gigabytes for the elastic pool. Must be a valid size supported by the selected service tier.

name.description: Specifies the name of the Elastic Pool. Must be unique within the SQL Server and comply with Azure naming conventions.

per_database_settings.description: Defines the minimum and maximum DTU settings for each database in the elastic pool.

server_name.description: Specifies the name of the SQL Server to associate with the Elastic Pool. This must exist in the same resource group and Azure region.

sku.description: Defines the pricing tier and performance level for the elastic pool, specifying the edition, family, and capacity.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to categorize and organize resources, supporting efficient management and cost tracking.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeout durations for create, update, and delete operations of the elastic pool.

zone_redundant.description: Specifies whether the elastic pool should be zone-redundant, requiring availability zones to be enabled in the region.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
